headline: Intel, Marvell, PayPal, IBM, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: FEATURE  Stocks were rising Wednesday, building on recent gains, as a cooler-than-expected producer price index print boosted investor sentiment. Wall Street also assessed another batch of quarterly earnings reports with chip-machine supplier ASML  offering an encouraging read on the artificial-intelligence trade.

headline: Stock Futures Jump. Market Rally Gathers Pace as Earnings Season Ramps Up.
summary: Stocks looked set to rise again on Wednesday, building on gains from the previous session that were powered by a solid start to the second-quarter earnings season and cooler-than-expected inflation data.  Nasdaq 100 futures added 0.4%.  Dow Jones Industrial Average futures rose 81 points, or 0.2%.
